title: psychotria peduncularis var. hypsophila
intro: Psychotria peduncularis var. hypsophila, also known as the 'Strychnine Tree', is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include its ability to exhibit anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Psychotria peduncularis var. hypsophila include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and intestinal parasites, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or infusion, which is used to treat various health issues.
